scope.included: only transitions directly represented by the current four-plan StrategyConfig
scope.excluded: BLOCK_V gap, dtype/workspace policy, SSA reuse, hoist, compiler code motion

plan_only_summary.verdict: good: current four-plan cost model captures most plan-level directions on this benchmark

plan_only_transition_rows.reason: BLOCK_SBS maps to tile_n; multibuffer maps to MultiBufferPlan.double_buffer/template.
plan_only_transition_rows.interpretation: Direction and rough gain magnitude are acceptable for this weak benchmark.

plan_only_transition_rows.reason: enable_mixed_cv is explicitly represented by StrategyConfig.enable_mixed_cv.
plan_only_transition_rows.interpretation: Direction and rough gain magnitude are acceptable for this weak benchmark.

plan_only_transition_rows.reason: auto_cv_balance is explicitly represented by StrategyConfig.auto_cv_balance. S4 is used as the local baseline so the dtype change S3->S4 is not counted.
plan_only_transition_rows.interpretation: Direction and rough gain magnitude are acceptable for this weak benchmark.

plan_only_transition_rows.reason: tile_mix_cube_loop/tile_mix_vector_loop are explicitly represented by StrategyConfig.
plan_only_transition_rows.interpretation: Direction and rough gain magnitude are acceptable for this weak benchmark.

boundary_gap_transitions.classification: conceptually TilingPlan, but not represented in current StrategyConfig
boundary_gap_transitions.reason: The current model maps BLOCK_SBS to tile_n and BLOCK_K to tile_k, but does not have a BLOCK_V/vector-block field. Therefore S0 and S1 become identical strategies in the current cost model.

out_of_scope_transitions.classification: dtype / workspace policy, not one of the current four plan knobs
IR rewrite / SSA reuse, not in current four-plan cost model
IR rewrite / code motion, not in current four-plan cost model
compiler pass / code motion, not in current four-plan cost model
